TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqCon-dialog3_robo_bakan 2021s

S.FORM: isu wa rengo.
S.TRANSL: 是妳啊！講啊！
It's your turn! Speak!

S.FORM: ita na wisu ta suupu tloong han na.
S.TRANSL: 我們就先坐在一起。
Let's sit together first.

S.FORM: wisu ka seediq di ma kika.
S.TRANSL: 有人過來了。
Someone's here.

S.FORM: mlawa ta ma aguh aguh aguh.
S.TRANSL: 我們就(對那個人)叫：「過來！過來！過來！」
Let's call out (to that person): "Come! Come! Come!"

S.FORM: uN ma eh yaku do mosa ku hmanguc sama kesa isu da munlamu peni egu kari isu han.
S.TRANSL: 你就說「我先去主菜！」很多種話(可以說)啊！妳不是很多話？妳先說啊！
"I'll go cook some vegetables," you'd say. (There are) all kinds of words (to say)! Aren't you talkative? You go first!

S.FORM: yaku de maanu uka so begu qnuuqu mesa ku ma.
S.TRANSL: 要說什麼啊？那我說：「有沒有酒啊？」
What should I say? "Is there any alcohol here?" I say.

S.FORM: un.
S.TRANSL: 對。
Right.

S.FORM: niqan wa si ma maanu ka cikun ta peni mesa ku yaku a.
S.TRANSL: 有人就說：「有(酒)啊。」那我就說：「我們要用什麼配酒啊？」
"There is (alcohol)", someone would say. Then, "What should we eat along with the alcohol?" I would say.

S.FORM: uh skadio mu so nngari hini han ah mesa su han.
S.TRANSL: 你先說：「我先找找看這裡剩下什麼。」
So you say: "Let me see what (food) is left over here first."

S.FORM: ima dadan ta kesaun mu plawaane ta ka kiya gaga inu mesa.
S.TRANSL: 我就說：「我們的朋友有誰呢？」「我們叫她吧！她在哪裡？」
"Who's our friend?" I'd say. "Let's call that person! Where is she?"

S.FORM: ga inu haruko ah c cece ta ha mesa ta han.
S.TRANSL: 我們會說：「我們的春子姊姊在哪裡呢？」
We would say: "Where is our sister Haruko?"

S.FORM: ma ukas a maanu mesa ka haruko.
S.TRANSL: 春子就說：「要幹嘛？」
Haruko replies: "What?"

S.FORM: aguh eyahi mangan a patis awi baso nii a miisu mian seno a.
S.TRANSL: 過來！來拿一下這封Awi Baso 寄來的信。我們害怕妳先生啦！
Come! Come and take this letter from Awi Baso! We are afraind of your husband.

S.FORM: naqah seno mseyang sa mplawa mimah sino.
S.TRANSL: 丈夫很不好。聽說互相邀約喝酒的話他會罵人。
The husband is bad. People say he scolds if we invite each other to drink.

S.FORM: naqah roro beebu na wa haruko denu.
S.TRANSL: Roro很不好。他到現在還會打春子。
Roro is bad. He still beats Haruko.

S.FORM: miicu riyung miicu riyung roro wa haruko.
S.TRANSL: 春子很怕Roro。
Haruko is very fraid of Roro.

S.FORM: har osaun miyan a mnangi ku mesa eyahi mangan tegami a m kesaun mu ma.
S.TRANSL: 我假裝說：「來拿信啊！」
I'll pretend to say "Come take the letter!"

S.FORM: mkela naq a uN nangiun mu mesa eyah mang tegami a.
S.TRANSL: 她自己會知道我只是假裝說：「來拿信啊！」
She'll know that I'm just pretending in saying "Come take the letter!"

S.FORM: mke mkela riyung kari isu ha.
S.TRANSL: 妳真的很會說話。
You are a brillian talker!

S.FORM: un mesa miyan eyahi mang tegami su mesa de miicu seno de kani eyah ma ado kesaun tegami de meyah kesaun ma.
S.TRANSL: 我們說：「來拿信啊！」她會害怕丈夫，所以(通常)是不會來(和我們一起喝酒)的。但因為我們(假裝)說有(她的)信(要拿)，她就會來了。
We can say "Come take your letter!". She is afraid of her husband, so (usually) she wouldn't come (to drink with us). But becuase we (pretend to) say that there is a letter (for her), she will come.

S.FORM: mkela naq a.
S.TRANSL: 她自己知道。
She knows that herself.

S.FORM: a m m mapa laqi diyan a mbserux ta mapa laqi di ma.
S.TRANSL: 白天背者孩子，我們會累。
Taking care of the children during the day, we get tired.

S.FORM: begu naqah kiya ka begu nami imahan sino de.
S.TRANSL: 那就是我們喝酒要配的湯。
That (mistaken) soup is what we will have with the alcohol.

S.FORM: kika m kika mimah sino de ka egu riyung ka kari di ma mhemuc mprengo di.
S.TRANSL: 所以這個喝酒呢，已經講很多了。只是隨意聊天而已。
So we've already talked a lot about drinking alcohol. It's just random chatting.

S.FORM: zheyangla.
S.TRANSL: 這樣啦。
That's it.
